name: Huafang Co., Ltd.
summary: Huafang Co., Ltd. operates in the textile printing and dyeing industry in China and internationally. It offers home textiles, fabrics, bedding, clothing, blue platinum, and fiber series products. The company is also involved in the thermal power, real estate, financial, and information service businesses. Huafang Co., Ltd. was founded in 1976 and is based in Binzhou, China.
